title: Coloring graphs with independence number two and no odd clique immersions
body_text:
Coloring graphs with independence number two and no odd clique immersions

We study the chromatic number of graphs that exclude a clique as a strong odd immersion and have independence number two. Given a graph $G$ and $t\in\mathbb{Z}^+$, we prove that if $α(G)\leq 2$ and $G$ has no strong odd $K_t$-immersion, then $χ(G)\leq \lceil \frac{3(t-1)}{2}\rceil$.

Authors: Henry Echeverría, Jessica McDonald
Categories: math.CO, math.CO
